title: Trick
description: A Trick is this system's spell. See MECHANICS.md section 4 for the authoritative spec. Three tiers: Pledge (at-will), Turn (free, limited by a cooldown), Prestige (OP, spends the caster's class engine). There are deliberately NO spell slots and NO upcasting: a Turn's power is tuned by its cooldown, a Prestige's by its engineCost.

id.description: kebab-case; should match the filename stem.

flavor.description: One or two lines of in-world colour. Kept out of sheetSummary.

tier.description: pledge = at-will cantrip equivalent, no cost/cooldown. turn = the workhorse; costs no engine, limited by cooldown. prestige = the showstopper; spends engine, minLevel 5+.

discipline.description: Replaces the 8 standard 5e schools (MECHANICS 4.9). Respects the locked damage-type list: Pyrotechnics = fire, Illusion/Mesmerism = psychic.

minLevel.description: Earliest character level a class may learn this. Prestiges are 5+.

cooldown.description: TURNS ONLY. Rounds the trick is 'Seen' before it can be cast again: you cannot cast it for this many of your turns. This is the sole balance dial for a Turn - a stronger effect gets a longer cooldown. Keep it 1-3; table bookkeeping is the real cost.

engineCost.description: PRESTIGES ONLY. How much of the caster's class engine (Phantasm/Mirth/Strings/Clones/Mayhem) this consumes. Price it to eat most of a built-up meter. NOTE: every Prestige is ALSO capped at once per combat - that is a tier-wide rule (MECHANICS 4.5), not a field, so there is nothing to set here and a new Prestige inherits it automatically.

components.description: Patter (voice, was Verbal) / Flourish (hands, was Somatic) / Prop (an object, was Material). Prop may carry a parenthetical, e.g. 'Prop (a deck of cards)'.

save.description: Optional. The saving throw a target makes, e.g. 'Wisdom'. Rendered as a chip.

description.description: Player-facing prose. Damage dice use the Scaling Die ([[XdY]] / [[XdY+Abil]]); every derived number is a {{Label|formula}} token - both are build-lint enforced.

sheetSummary.description: Condensed mechanics-only text for the future character sheet: effect, damage + type, conditions, cost/uses. No flavor. Not linted.

options.description: For tricks offering a menu or a random table. Rendered as a table by the shared optionTable renderer.

classes.description: Class ids that may learn this trick, e.g. ['illusionist','joker'].

then.description: A Pledge is at-will: it may not carry a cooldown or an engine cost.
A Turn is limited by a cooldown and NEVER spends engine (Kayki's absolute rule).
A Prestige spends engine, is gated to level 5+, and needs no cooldown - the engine price is its limiter.
